## Plugin Submission Checklist

<!-- Fill in all items before opening the PR. Unchecked items will delay review. -->

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] My `id` is unique and in `kebab-case`
- [ ] `sourceUrl` points to a **specific commit SHA**, not a branch name
- [ ] `status` is set to `"pending"` (not `"approved"`)
- [ ] `verified` is `false`
- [ ] The plugin file at `sourceUrl` is accessible (returns 200)
- [ ] I have tested the plugin in the Dashboard and it works correctly
- [ ] I have specified a valid `license`

## Description

<!-- Describe what your plugin does in a few sentences. -->

## Tags

<!-- List the tags you chose and why they fit. -->

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything the reviewer should know: external APIs used, permissions needed, etc. -->
